title: Clean up man pages to match commands
body:
Also add podman-commands.sh to compare man pages to commands.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

Differences I'm still seeing:
* `podman --help` still includes `sign` (solution: remove from `commands.go:rootCommands`?)
* `podman container --help` does not list `inspect` (and in fact it doesn't even work).
* `podman image --help` lists the option as `rmi`, man page as `rm`
@edsantiago Yes my script catches the issues with the command, this PR is just to get the script in and fix the man pages to be correct.

With Brents Patch this is what I am seeing now.
```
./hack/podman-commands.sh 
diff -B -u /tmp/podman.cmd /tmp/podman.man
diff -B -u /tmp/podman-image.cmd /tmp/podman-image.man
--- /tmp/podman-image.cmd	2019-02-27 15:49:02.798997841 -0500
+++ /tmp/podman-image.man	2019-02-27 15:49:02.825998023 -0500
@@ -1,14 +1,15 @@
 build
 exists
 history
-images
 import
 inspect
+list
 load
+ls
 prune
 pull
 push
-rmi
+rm
 save
 sign
 tag
diff -B -u /tmp/podman-container.cmd /tmp/podman-container.man
--- /tmp/podman-container.cmd	2019-02-27 15:49:02.848998179 -0500
+++ /tmp/podman-container.man	2019-02-27 15:49:02.872998341 -0500
@@ -7,8 +7,11 @@
 exec
 exists
 export
+inspect
 kill
+list
 logs
+ls
 mount
 pause
 port
@@ -25,5 +28,6 @@
 stop
 top
 umount
+unmount
 unpause
 wait
diff -B -u /tmp/podman-system.cmd /tmp/podman-system.man
diff -B -u /tmp/podman-play.cmd /tmp/podman-play.man
diff -B -u /tmp/podman-generate.cmd /tmp/podman-generate.man
diff -B -u /tmp/podman-pod.cmd /tmp/podman-pod.man
diff -B -u /tmp/podman-volume.cmd /tmp/podman-volume.man
```

/retest

(looks like a flake.) Last 3 lines of build.log.txt are:
```
2019/02/27 22:51:32 Tagging fedora-install into stable
2019/02/27 22:51:33 Ran for 7m31s
error: could not run steps: could not wait for build: the build centos-install failed after 2s with reason GenericBuildFailed: Generic Build failure - check logs for details.
```
